description:
The HoverDynamicValueSet component listens for a user's hover event on a UIX element and sets a value.

}}

fields.VariableName: The dynamic variable name to find these values.
fields.ValueOnBeginHover: The value to set when a hover event is detected.
fields.ValueOnEndHover: The value to set when a hover event has ended.
fields.SetValueOnBeginHover: Sets the value when a hover event is detected.
fields.SetValueOnEndHover: Sets the value when a hover event has ended.
